1. Whether the picture has been tampered with / Description of the tampered area: The picture has not been tampered with. It appears to be a direct capture from a camera.

2. Judgment basis: The image shows a receipt with text and numerical data. The lighting and shadows on the text and numbers are consistent with a single light source, suggesting that the image has not been altered in this regard. The edges of the text and numbers are sharp and clear, with no signs of blurring or pixelation that would indicate manipulation. The resolution of the image is uniform across the entire receipt, without any areas of differing quality that might suggest a composite image. The perspective is consistent with a flat surface, and there are no unusual scale relationships or depth of field issues. The text and numbers are legible and conform to the expected appearance of a receipt, with no signs of unnatural text insertion or distortion. There are no violations of physical laws or any other inconsistencies that would suggest the image has been tampered with.
